regional_cost_note: Architects in Gisborne typically charge 8–15% of construction cost for residential design, or a fixed fee of $5,500–$28,000+ for smaller projects. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. An architect adds most value on complex or high-value projects — for simple alterations a building designer may be more cost-effective.
